comments.comment: Updated EF for kiln from ESP control to wet scrubber control.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in production/operating days. Updated the EF for power boiler emissions (main stack) from wood only EF (46.5% of TPM) to wood+natural gas (57% of TPM) as the power boilers operate on NG and hog fuel. Updated kiln emission factor to wet scrubber control from ESP control.
